name: realtor-lead-capture
description: Turns the agent's offer into a lead-capture machine. It writes a lead magnet (a brand-led guide for their whole audience, or a focused buyer/seller guide built straight from their offer) and maps the opt-in funnel that gives it away — two perfectly aligned documents: the copy, structure, and conversion strategy. Text only: it writes the words and the strategy (a separate design skill builds the visuals); it never hosts. Lead capture only — no call booking. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.
